description_long: This is a pair of brown slip-on sandals featuring a wide, woven-textured strap across the top of each foot. The footbed is smooth and slightly contoured, designed for comfort, and matches the color of the strap. The outsole is thin and black, providing a subtle contrast to the upper and footbed. The sandals have an open-toe and open-heel design, making them ideal for casual, warm-weather urban environments. The woven pattern on the strap adds a touch of visual interest and texture. There are no visible logos, embellishments, or fasteners, giving the sandals a minimalist and versatile appearance.
description: A pair of brown slip-on sandals with woven-textured straps and smooth, thin black outsoles. The design is minimalist, open-toe, and open-heel, suitable for casual urban wear.
description_view_0: Front view showing the open-toe design and the woven texture of the wide straps.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the thin black outsole and the flat, smooth footbed.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the open-heel design and the full length of the footbed.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the woven strap and the sandal's overall slim profile.
